af_score_components.notes: AgroBR MCP — Brazilian agriculture API integration. Has MCP (quality 60). Regional focus (Brazil only). Documentation limited. API key required. Rate limits undocumented. Specialized domain (agribusiness).

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Agricultural data (crop info, pricing) is business-sensitive. No PCI compliance (not financial). Regional compliance (Brazil LGPD). Community wrapper (not official).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Brazilian API stability (regional variation). No SLA. Agricultural data real-time but seasonal patterns affect usage. Suitable for regional agribusiness automation.

af_score_components.notes: Aguara MCP — specialized MCP (domain unclear). Has MCP (quality 60). Minimal documentation. Purpose not evident from name. Likely niche/regional tool. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insufficient documentation. Assume generic security baseline.

af_score_components.notes: Ahrefs MCP server. Has MCP (quality 80). Official Ahrefs SEO tool integration. Excellent documentation. API key required. Rate limits well-documented. SEO/marketing focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Strong API key auth. Ahrefs infrastructure (established SaaS). Fine-grained scoping (domain, keyword, competitor analysis). No PII by design. Enterprise security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Ahrefs has enterprise SLA and status page. Official SDK maintained. Rate limits generous. Retry guidance documented. Ideal for SEO automation and competitive analysis.

af_score_components.notes: AI Agent Team MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Multi-agent coordination framework. Documentation moderate. Auth for team operations. Rate limits for coordination messages. Agent orchestration focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agent team coordination requires careful auth isolation. Message integrity critical (prevent tampering). Privilege escalation risks. Token scoping per agent role. Audit logging.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Multi-agent systems add complexity. Cascading failures possible. No SLA. Suitable for coordinating multiple agents with resilience planning.

af_score_components.notes: ai-command — command/instruction framework for AI. No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Purpose for structured AI commands. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Early-stage framework. Security posture unclear. Command injection risks if not careful. No documentation.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Early stage. No reliability track record.

af_score_components.notes: ai-counsel — AI legal counsel/advice tool. No MCP documented. Documentation sparse. Purpose for legal advice generation. Regulatory compliance concerns.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal content (privileged communication concerns). HTTPS likely. Auth for legal interactions. Client data protection. Liability/malpractice considerations. Not suitable for actual legal advice without proper disclaimers.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Legal tool reliability important. No SLA. Early stage — not suitable for production legal advice.

af_score_components.notes: AI Diagram/Prototype Generator MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Design automation tool. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for generation. Creative tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Design artifacts (diagrams, prototypes) could contain IP. Local tool (no network security critical). Output files should be protected. No built-in DRM/watermarking.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Design generation reliability (deterministic). Output quality varies with input. No SLA. Suitable for automated prototyping workflows.

af_score_components.notes: AI Distiller MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Model distillation/compression tool. Documentation moderate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for model operations. ML-ops focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Model weights (intellectual property). Local tool. Output models could contain sensitive patterns. No built-in IP protection. Training data not exposed.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Distillation reliability (computational stability). Long-running operations. No SLA. Suitable for model compression workflows.

af_score_components.notes: AI Entity-Relationship Diagram generator. Has MCP (quality 70). Schema/database design automation. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for generation. Data modeling focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Generated schemas (design artifacts). Local tool. Output should be version-controlled. No PII by design (structural, not data).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Schema generation reliability (deterministic). Output format consistency. Suitable for database automation.

af_score_components.notes: AI Humanizer MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Text humanization/rewriting. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for text processing. Content generation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Text processing (could contain PII). Local tool. No built-in privacy controls. Output text should be reviewed. Potential for plagiarism if misused.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Text generation reliability (quality varies). No SLA. Suitable for content transformation workflows.
